seoTitle: Willowra vs Wilton — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Willowra and Wilton. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Willowra and Wilton.
heading: Willowra vs Wilton — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Willowra, Northern Territory and Wilton, Northern Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wilton has a lower overall climate risk score (27/100) compared to Willowra (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Willowra or Wilton safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Willowra has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Wilton scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Willowra scores 56/100 for bushfire risk. Wilton scores 15/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Willowra or Wilton?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wilton has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.45% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
